subject: Internship inquiry - Computer Engineering graduate
body:
Hello 10up team,

My name is Eyobel Zeleke Berie. I am a Computer Engineering graduate based in Ethiopia, and I am looking for an internship or junior opportunity where I can contribute, learn quickly, and grow with a strong engineering team.

My background includes Python, C/C++, Arduino, React, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Spring Boot, RESTful APIs, with project experience across embedded AI, FastAPI backends, React dashboards, PostgreSQL, Spring Boot, and network engineering. I am especially interested in backend, full-stack, embedded AI, Python, or junior software engineering work.

I wanted to ask politely if your team has any internship openings, trainee roles, apprenticeship-style opportunities, or even an unpaid internship where I could prove myself through useful work. I would be grateful for the chance to contribute to a real project and learn from your engineers.

I can share my resume, portfolio, GitHub, or complete a small trial task if that helps.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
Eyobel Zeleke Berie
